calendar.matters:
No. Petition For Order Confirming Property Belonging To Frederick W. Reid, Iii Living Trust, Dated August 5, 2024
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Leon Ainer appeared via zoom for Tyler Reid (petitioner).
Vincent Yu appeared via zoom for Gail Reid. (respondent).

The Court deemed Mr. Yu's appearance as a general appearance waiving formal service to his client Gail Reid. Mr. Yu stated her client was having issues with the executing the document, and that she doesn't object. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
